description: Adages and ethical exhortations in Judaeo-Arabic. Some of them concern love and marriage. (This is not a letter, as it was described in the Baker & Polliack catalogue.) On verso of fol. 2 there is a name: Saʿīd b. Shelom[o ...] b. Rabīʿ b. [....]. Maybe a colophon. AA. ASE.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
